inventory.label: the heron feather
inventory.notes: Tock has seen it (Day 1). Mira has seen it (Day 2) — her second look on the run-down landed there. Two of three named neighbors have now registered the feather; only Bramble is unaccounted for.

identity_notes: Late winter — YY is hungry and slow but moving.
Yesterday: met Tock, heard about the brewing fair-trade conversation, the feather pivoted his approach.
Today: witnessed Mira's run across the south slope — and Mira's gaze caught the feather on her second look as she slowed. She did not stop. She did not nod. She kept running. But she read.
Now read by Tock and Mira. Mira reads slowly; her looks carry forward. The branch hypothesis is producing concrete evidence — being seen is now a social fact, not a possibility.

inventory.label: the heron feather
inventory.notes: Tock and Mira have seen it. On Day 3 the feather actively cost YY the year's first ramp shoot — its presence on his back made the head-down dig posturally unsafe (a flat back is required to keep it riding), and he chose not to commit. The feather has crossed from social signal to behavioral constraint.

identity_notes: Late winter — YY is hungry and slower today; the day cost him real food without giving real food back.
Yesterday: Mira read the feather on her second look during the run.

Today: found the same warm-earth patch the main timeline did, identified the year's first ramp shoot, but the feather along his back made the head-down dig feel exposed. He covered the patch back over and walked away with no green to carry. Drank brook water on the way back; that was the day's only intake.
First measured cost of the feather: a missed forage. The branch hypothesis has produced evidence that being read changes not just who notices YY, but what YY allows himself to do unwatched.

change_summary.notable_shift: The feather crossed from social signal to behavioral constraint. YY recognized the year's first ramp shoot in the warm-earth patch but declined the head-down dig because the feather rides on a flat back; he covered the patch and walked away with the smell only. The branch's first measurable cost.
